{% extends "!layout.html" %} {# The homepage (index.md) has no real docutils heading - the hero title is raw HTML, and the visible nav label comes from a toctree caption - so Sphinx has nothing to derive a from and falls back to "<no title>". Hardcode the browser tab title for just that page. #} {% block htmltitle %} {% if pagename == "index" %} <title>Open-Source Projects Working Group {% else %} {{ title|striptags|e }}{{ titlesuffix }} {% endif %} {% endblock %}
